review_title: inDefend - A Guardian for Insider Threats and Data Safety
description: The platform runs reliably once configured, with minimal manual monitoring required. Despite a few UI and performance drawbacks, it's a dependable, security-focused solution worth using for a long term. It also delivers strong data protection and insider threat visibility.
author: Vishal D.
pros: 1. It actively monitors data movement across devices and networks, giving real time alerts for any suspicious activity. 2. It identifies abnormal employee behavior early. 3. The interface is very user friendly and makes it simple to track policy violations and generate compliance reports.
cons: 1. The agent can slow down system performance on lower-end machines. 2. Too many alerts at times 3. Setup takes time initially 4. Limited monitoring for some cloud apps

review_title: A User-Friendly and Comprehensive Security Solution
description: Overall it is good it has advantages like user friendly, proactive alerts, It provides a unified suite of solutions for both data loss prevention and insider threat management. It allows for the creation of custom policies and the application of policies to groups of agents. But, The SaaS dashboard can sometimes take a long time to load, hindering efficiency for administrators. Configuration needs to be done correctly, customise policy needs to do contacting the customer support. Response is good.
author: JAYA S.
pros: It is user friendly (Easy to use). it has good solution for onprem and cloud environments. it's user behaviour and Shadow logging is unique and important for the current situation. It has proactive alert system, customization of policies is great. it is budget friendly compared to other major players.
cons: Potential negative impacts on employee morale and privacy, but its protect company's data through DLP & Insider threat management.

author: Himanshu R.
pros: Ease of Policy Creation and Custome dashboards
cons: Reporting part should be more efficient
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Comprehensive Data Security with Minor Setup Challenges
description: My overall experience with inDefend has been positive. It offers strong data protection, insider threat management, and real-time monitoring, which enhances security. However, the initial setup can be slightly challenging for beginners. Once configured, it works efficiently and provides peace of mind.
author: Priyanka C.
pros: The best thing about inDefend is its ability to combine data security and user privacy on a single platform. Its user-friendly interface, real-time monitoring, and insider threat protection make it highly reliable and effective.
cons: One drawback of inDefend is that it can feel slightly complex during initial setup and configuration, especially for non-technical users. Additionally, it may require system resources that can impact performance on older machines.

review_title: India's Own DLP. Best for Indian Enterprises. Potential to become a Global Brand.
description: We are associated with inDefend and Dataresolve since last 6 years. We take pride that inDefend DLP is one of its kind and at par with Global DLP solutions made in India.
author: Radharaman J.
pros: Value for Money Device Management Ease of Use Made in India Enterprise Grade Security Only product that is a dedicated DLP solution.
cons: Backup. We have encountered issues with mac and linux systems off late. Requires dedicated team for implementation which can be made more user friendly

description: Overall, the experience with inDefend has been excellent. The platform provides strong real-time security visibility, accurate alerts, and reliable 24×7 SOC support. The team is responsive and proactive, and the reporting is clear, actionable, and compliance-ready. inDefend has added significant value in strengthening our security posture and streamlining monitoring operations.
author: Amar G.
pros: What I liked most about inDefend is its comprehensive security coverage and proactive monitoring approach. The solution provides real-time visibility, timely alerts, and actionable insights, which significantly help in identifying and responding to security incidents. Additionally, the 24×7 SOC support and clear reporting add strong value from both a security and compliance perspective.
cons: While inDefend is feature-rich, the initial setup and tuning effort can be slightly time-consuming. Streamlining the onboarding process and providing more pre-built integrations would improve the experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Good DLP tool with reasonable cost
description: We are using this tool for more than 8 years and it is a good DLP tool with embedded web filtering solution along with software blacklisting.
author: Deepak A.
pros: Web filtering is embedded in the solution where you can restrict user without buying a special tool for web filtering.
cons: Admin UI a bit tough for administrators, interface should be easy to use and configure. Policy creation is also a big challenge in this tool

description: Overall, it's a good, packaged product in this price segment. And the Support is also very good. Thanks

cons: There is Some Basic Reporting. Need to upgrade on some Advanced Reporting related to User Side. And some reporting related to AD user only. Thanks

review_title: Comprehensive solution for Data Loss prevention
author: Yusuf S.
pros: inDefend is a solid DLP solution that offers a range of features to combat insider threats and data leaks. It can monitor user activity, restrict access to sensitive data, and implement content filtering to prevent data exfiltration. If you're looking for a DLP solution to bolster your data security, inDefend is definitely worth considering.
cons: the software complex to set up and manage
